fields.name: ICRC Yemen
fields.services: Healthcare (42 facilities supported, 1.1M+ consultations/year), water/sanitation (1.1M beneficiaries), mine clearance, detainee visits, economic support. Community Contact: 8005544 / WhatsApp +967-737503687

fields.name: WFP Yemen
fields.services: Emergency food distribution, cash transfers, nutrition programs, school meals. Email: WFP.Sanaa@wfp.org. Serves 19.5M in need

fields.name: Yemen Red Crescent Society
fields.services: Emergency response, ambulance services, first aid, humanitarian aid distribution. Works in partnership with ICRC

fields.services: Emergency shelter, food distribution, water, basic medical care. Major IDP concentration (hundreds of thousands displaced)

fields.name: Al-Hudaydah Water Distribution
fields.services: Clean water distribution, WASH services. ICRC-supported water programs in Hudaydah governorate

fields.name: Damascus Hospital (Al-Mujtahid)
fields.services: Emergency, cardiology, neurology, nephrology, cardiac/neuro surgery, kidney transplant, MRI/CT, 11 operating rooms - 645 beds (36 ICU)

fields.name: Aleppo University Hospital
fields.services: Emergency, surgery, trauma, all specialties, teaching hospital - ~1500 beds pre-war. Status may be affected by conflict damage

fields.name: Tishreen Military Hospital
fields.services: Emergency, surgery, trauma, military medicine, rehabilitation - ~1000 beds

fields.name: National Hospital Latakia
fields.services: Emergency, surgery, internal medicine, pediatrics, maternal health - ~400 beds. Located in relatively safer coastal area

fields.name: ICRC Syria
fields.services: Food, healthcare, water/sanitation, missing persons tracing (35,000+ cases), detainee support, livelihood restoration. Works with Syrian Arab Red Crescent. Present since 1967

fields.name: WFP Syria
fields.services: Food distribution (3.6M served 2024), school meals (460K students), nutrition (300K women/children), livelihoods programs. Email: syria.media@wfp.org

fields.name: Syrian Arab Red Crescent (SARC)
fields.services: Emergency response, ambulance services, humanitarian aid, health services. Primary ICRC partner in Syria

fields.name: Bab al-Hawa Border Crossing Camp
fields.services: IDP shelter, food distribution, medical care, WASH services. Major humanitarian crossing point on Syria-Turkey border

fields.name: Al-Hol Camp
fields.services: IDP/refugee shelter, water distribution, food, basic health services. One of Syria's largest displacement camps in Hasakeh governorate

fields.name: Indira Gandhi Children's Hospital
fields.services: Emergency, pediatrics, cerebral palsy treatment, prosthetics center (capacity ~1000). 400 beds (150 operational). Founded 1969

fields.name: Mirwais Hospital
fields.services: Emergency, surgery (3 theatres, 150 surgical beds), pediatrics, blood bank, X-ray. 600 beds. ICRC-supported (70% funding). Serves Kandahar, Helmand, Zabul, Oruzgan provinces

fields.name: Jamhuriat Hospital
fields.services: Emergency, pediatric oncology, general medicine. 350 beds (4-story + 10-story buildings). Under renovation as of 2023

fields.name: Herat Regional Hospital
fields.services: Emergency, surgery, internal medicine, maternal health, pediatrics - ~350 beds

fields.name: ICRC Afghanistan
fields.services: Healthcare (1.27M served), 7 physical rehab centres (218K patients), water/sanitation, family reunification, cash-for-work, education. Alt phone: +93-701150000. Twitter: @ICRC_af

fields.name: WFP Afghanistan
fields.services: Emergency food, nutrition, school meals, cash assistance, UNHAS air service (12+ hard-to-reach locations). Email: WFP.Kabul@wfp.org. 17.4M projected food insecure

fields.name: Afghan Red Crescent Society (ARCS)
fields.services: Primary health care clinics, emergency response, ambulance services. ICRC primary partner in Afghanistan

fields.name: ICRC Physical Rehabilitation Centres
fields.services: Physical rehabilitation, prosthetics, cerebral palsy care. 7 centres: Kabul, Nangarhar, Badakhshan, Balkh, Herat, Gulbahar, Helmand. 218,824 patients served

fields.name: Herat IDP Settlements
fields.services: IDP shelter, food distribution, water access. Herat hosts significant displaced population

fields.name: HEAL Africa Hospital, Goma
fields.services: Surgery (fistula repair), orthopedics, internal medicine, pediatrics, obstetrics, community health programs

fields.name: Panzi Hospital, Bukavu
fields.services: Reconstructive surgery for sexual violence survivors, obstetrics/gynecology, internal medicine, AIDS diagnostics, pediatrics. Founded by Nobel laureate Dr. Denis Mukwege

fields.name: Centre Hospitalier Universitaire de Kinshasa
fields.services: Emergency medicine, surgery, internal medicine, pediatrics, obstetrics, ICU - main teaching hospital in Kinshasa

fields.name: ICRC Kinshasa Delegation
fields.services: Medical consultations, surgery for weapon injuries, psychological support, physical rehabilitation, clean water (675K+ served), family reunification, food/financial aid (214K+ served), sexual violence response. Media: +243-81-992-2328

fields.name: WFP DRC Office, Kinshasa
fields.services: Food distribution (5.3M served 2024), emergency food assistance, nutrition programs, school feeding, humanitarian air services (UNHAS). Alt: +243-81-555-2199. Email: claude.kalinga@wfp.org

fields.name: Croix-Rouge de la RDC (DRC Red Cross)
fields.services: Emergency response, first aid, ambulance services, disaster relief, community health

fields.name: Bulengo IDP Camp, Goma
fields.services: Emergency shelter, food distribution, water points, basic medical care. One of multiple IDP camps west of Goma hosting displaced from M23 conflict

fields.name: Banadir Hospital, Mogadishu
fields.services: Maternity care, pediatrics, surgery, obstetrics/gynecology, internal medicine, orthopedics, laboratory, pharmacy. 700 beds, serves ~3M people

fields.name: Erdogan Hospital (Somalia-Turkey Training & Research Hospital), Mogadishu
fields.services: Surgery, internal medicine, emergency care, specialized departments, training/research. Largest Turkish-built hospital in Africa (~200 beds)

fields.name: Hargeisa Group Hospital, Somaliland
fields.services: Maternity, emergency, dental, ophthalmology, pediatrics, surgery, internal medicine, nephrology, orthopedics. 400 beds. Largest public hospital in Somaliland (est. 1953)

fields.name: ICRC Somalia Delegation, Mogadishu
fields.services: Emergency assistance, humanitarian law, family reconnection, physical rehabilitation, child malnutrition treatment, cash assistance, healthcare. 12 offices across Somalia. Community Contact: 373. WhatsApp: +254-706-408-908

fields.name: WFP Somalia (Nairobi Office)
fields.services: Emergency food/nutrition (6.5M food insecure), cash transfers, school meals, social protection (Baxnaano), humanitarian air services, logistics. Email: somalia.feedback@wfp.org

fields.name: Somali Red Crescent Society, Mogadishu
fields.services: Emergency response, first aid, community health, disaster preparedness. Primary ICRC partner across Somalia

fields.name: Dadaab Refugee Camp Complex (Kenya border)
fields.services: Healthcare (Kenya Red Cross, IRC, MSF), solar-powered water boreholes, education (70K+ students), food distribution (WFP), microfinance (CARE). 4 camps: Dagahaley, Hagadera, Ifo, Ifo II. 426K+ refugees

fields.name: Tikur Anbessa (Black Lion) Specialized Hospital, Addis Ababa
fields.services: Emergency care, surgery, orthopedics (16 consultants), internal medicine, cardiology, oncology, ICU. 700 beds, 400 doctors, 900 nurses. Teaching hospital (est. 1964)

fields.name: St. Paul's Hospital Millennium Medical College, Addis Ababa
fields.services: Emergency department, hemodialysis, National Kidney Transplant Center, 13+ departments. 700+ beds, 200K patients/year, catchment 5M+. 75% patients treated free

fields.name: Ayder Comprehensive Specialized Hospital, Mekelle
fields.services: Surgery (only surgical facility in Tigray), newborn care, dialysis, cancer care, MRI. 2nd largest hospital in Ethiopia, serves 8M+ people, 3600 staff. Severely impacted during Tigray War

fields.name: Felege Hiwot Referral Hospital, Bahir Dar
fields.services: Emergency medicine, surgery, internal medicine, pediatrics, obstetrics/gynecology. Main referral hospital for Amhara Region

fields.name: ICRC Ethiopia Delegation, Addis Ababa
fields.services: Protection/assistance, IHL promotion, water/sanitation (1M+ reached), family links (294K reunion calls), health support (434K patients), medical supplies. Community Contact: 9167

fields.name: Ethiopian Red Cross Society, Addis Ababa
fields.services: Emergency response, first aid, ambulance, disaster relief, blood bank services, community health. ICRC partner

fields.name: Gambella Refugee Camps (South Sudanese refugees)
fields.services: Emergency shelter, food distribution, water, education, health. 8 camps: Nguenyyie, Pinyudo, Tierkidi, Akula, Jawi, Leitchuor, Okugo. ~402K+ refugees (UNHCR/ARRA managed)

fields.name: Juba Teaching Hospital
fields.services: Emergency, surgery, obstetrics/gynecology, neonatal ICU, infectious disease, vaccinations. 512 beds, serves 8.26M people. National referral hospital (University of Juba)

fields.name: Malakal Teaching Hospital
fields.services: Maternity, outpatient department (limited - only 3 doctors as of 2021). ICRC/UNICEF supported. Damaged during 2014 civil war, partially reopened 2017

fields.name: Wau Teaching Hospital
fields.services: General medicine, surgery, maternity, outpatient care

fields.name: ICRC South Sudan Delegation, Juba
fields.services: Family reunification, physical rehabilitation (3 centres: Juba, Rumbek, Wau), weapon-wound surgery, mental health support, water access, detention monitoring, sexual violence response, Sudanese refugee assistance

fields.name: South Sudan Red Cross (SSRC), Juba
fields.services: Emergency preparedness, first aid, community health, disaster response, volunteer mobilization. ICRC primary partner in South Sudan

fields.name: Bentiu POC Site (UNMISS), Unity State

fields.name: Malakal POC Site, Upper Nile State
fields.services: Emergency shelter, medical care, water distribution, food, protection services. UNMISS/UNHCR/WFP/MSF managed. ~30K+ displaced persons

fields.name: Myanmar Red Cross Society, Yangon
fields.services: Emergency response, ambulance, first aid, disaster relief, community health. ICRC primary partner in Myanmar

fields.name: MSF Rakhine State Clinics
fields.services: Emergency medical care, maternal health, Rohingya health services, mobile clinics. Critical healthcare provider in Rakhine

fields.name: Tripoli Central Hospital
